summary: DSOUZA BANK fintech website — adjusting layout to integrate AI Chatbot and Voice Assistant into the top-right header section alongside existing icons (Font Size Toggle, Language Selector, Accessibility). Maintaining premium fintech look with dark typography, glassmorphism chatbot panel, and voice assistant with pulse animation.
architectural_notes: Header icons order (right side): Font Size Toggle → Language Selector → Accessibility → AI Chatbot → Voice Assistant
AI Chatbot panel uses glassmorphism style with #111111 text; supports English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Tamil
Voice Assistant uses Royal Indigo glow and pulse animation; integrates with selected language for STT/TTS

existing_features.title: Restructure the top-right section of the Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx) to display all five controls in a single horizontal row with 16–20px equal gaps, vertically centered, and consistent icon sizing. The order must be: [ Font Size Toggle ] [ Language Selector ] [ Accessibility Icon ] [ AI Chatbot ] [ Voice Assistant ]. Remove any existing standalone floating placements of the chatbot or voice assistant from the header area and consolidate them here.

Add or update an inline AI Chatbot trigger button in the header labeled 'DSOUZA AI' with a small chat/bot icon and the text label beneath or beside it. When clicked, open a slide-down or side panel using glassmorphism styling (frosted glass background, subtle border, backdrop blur). The panel must use deep black readable text (#111111), support language selection among English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, and Tamil, include an adjustable font size control inside the panel, and include a Senior Mode toggle that enlarges text and increases contrast within the panel. The panel must close when the trigger is clicked again or when clicking outside.

Add or update an inline Voice Assistant trigger button in the header showing a microphone icon with the label 'Voice'. The button must display a subtle Royal Indigo (#4B0082 or equivalent) glow. When the voice assistant is active (listening), apply a visible pulse animation to the microphone icon. Clicking the button opens a compact dropdown for voice interaction that supports speech-to-text (capturing user speech) and text-to-speech (reading responses aloud) using the Web Speech API, operating in the currently selected app language.

Apply visual refinements across the header and both new panels: ensure all heading text is #000000, all body text is #111111 (no faded grey text), add subtle hover animations (e.g., scale or opacity transition) to all five header controls, and maintain a premium fintech aesthetic with breathing space between elements so the header does not appear crowded.

new_feature_requests.summary: Place AI Chatbot ('DSOUZA AI') in top-right header with glassmorphism panel, multi-language support, adjustable font size, and Senior Mode toggle
Place Voice Assistant in top-right header with microphone icon, Royal Indigo glow, pulse animation when active, speech-to-text and text-to-speech support
Header layout: horizontal alignment [ Font Size ] [ Language ] [ Accessibility ] [ AI Chatbot ] [ Voice Assistant ] with 16-20px equal spacing, vertically centered, consistent icon size
Visual refinement: dark typography (#000000 headings, #111111 body), subtle hover animations, premium fintech look, no faded grey text
